resolution_summary: Mobile device registration refreshed after battery optimization check.
raw_text:
Customer: Push notifications for our catering team arrive late on Android but desktop alerts are instant.
Agent: Check that battery optimization is disabled for Northstar Relay, then refresh the device registration from Mobile settings.
Resolution: Mobile device registration refreshed after battery optimization check.

customer_message: A new teammate at the catering team cannot accept the invite after we changed domains.
agent_response: Cancel the pending invite, send a new invite to the current domain, and ask the teammate to open it in a private browser window.
resolution_summary: Invite resent for the current domain and pending stale invite removed.
raw_text:
Subject: Northstar Relay support
Customer wrote: A new teammate at the catering team cannot accept the invite after we changed domains.
Support replied: Cancel the pending invite, send a new invite to the current domain, and ask the teammate to open it in a private browser window.

customer_message: The catering team workspace shows appointments in the wrong local time.
agent_response: Set the workspace time zone under Settings, then refresh calendar sync so existing appointment cards display in the local time.
resolution_summary: Workspace time zone corrected and calendar sync refreshed.
raw_text: Case note. Customer problem: The catering team workspace shows appointments in the wrong local time. Support response: Set the workspace time zone under Settings, then refresh calendar sync so existing appointment cards display in the local time. Outcome: Workspace time zone corrected and calendar sync refreshed.

customer_message: Can we pin VIP customer messages for the catering team above the regular inbox queue?
agent_response: Add a VIP tag rule with priority inbox placement, then turn on pinned queue view for the support team.
resolution_summary: VIP tag rule added and pinned queue view enabled.
raw_text: MIXED THREAD :: user=Can we pin VIP customer messages for the catering team above the regular inbox queue? :: assistant=Add a VIP tag rule with priority inbox placement, then turn on pinned queue view for the support team. :: outcome=VIP tag rule added and pinned queue view enabled.

customer_message: Our reminder automation for the catering team sends twice when a customer replies quickly.
agent_response: Add a condition that skips the reminder if the conversation received a customer reply after the trigger time.
resolution_summary: Reminder automation updated with a reply-after-trigger condition.
raw_text:
Customer: Our reminder automation for the catering team sends twice when a customer replies quickly.
Agent: Add a condition that skips the reminder if the conversation received a customer reply after the trigger time.
Resolution: Reminder automation updated with a reply-after-trigger condition.

customer_message: Messages tagged billing for our bakery still keep landing in Unassigned after we changed the routing rule.
agent_response: Open Routing rules, move the billing rule above the catch-all rule, then run the preview against the last five messages before saving.
resolution_summary: Rule order corrected; future billing messages route to the expected team.
raw_text:

customer_message: The invoice receipt for our clinic still shows the old billing contact name.
agent_response: Update the billing contact in Workspace billing, then regenerate the receipt from Billing history so the exported PDF uses the new name.
resolution_summary: Billing contact updated and receipt regenerated from billing history.
raw_text: Case note. Customer problem: The invoice receipt for our clinic still shows the old billing contact name.
